subject: FW: Helicopter
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: lvjet@aol.com [mailto:lvjet@aol.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, December 05, 2007 2:34 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: Ghislaine Maxwell
Subject: Helicopter

Lesley,
Info for je,
Our Bell 407 helicopter is finished with maintenance and is ready to
fly.
-note there is a T.F.R. (Temporary Flight Restriction) is in place for
Google Guys wedding on Sunday, if Je is planning on flying there, I will
need to obtain permission from BVI cival aviation since Google has
requested no private flights into that airspace on Sunday from Noon till
midnight.
LV
Sent from my BlackBerry(r) wireless handheld
